rows.source_ref: jamesagnew, '144 ema method', ForexFactory thread #1348501 (30 posts, 2 pages), n.d. — https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/1348501-144-ema-method
rows.concept: Enter on a 5-minute close past a 34-EMA displaced 16 bars forward, with a 144-EMA breach as the stop and a fixed 17-pip target.
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic displaced-EMA breakout, pure MQL5, FX M5 data available, explicit SL (144-EMA breach) + TP (17 pips) — FTMO/DXZ compatible.
rows.notes: Low-reputation forum source: per thread the proponent posts a new system nightly (none good) and never shows live trades; skeptics call it curve-fit MA crossover. Params arbitrary (34-EMA shift 16, 17-pip TP, 144-EMA SL) — 'why these numbers?' unanswered. Archetypal MA-crossover, flagged non-robust by our own FX-edge doctrine. Variant (page 2): drop the 17-pip TP, hold until opposite 34-EMA close. Secondary ref by flashpaul to a sibling '144 x 77 ema and 77 ema method' thread.
